evals.expected_output: Activates rocket-launch: runs every launch gate (targeted tests pass via lab lens command-proof/smoke-proof/ui-proof as appropriate, a biters correctness lens is clean or findings are fixed, all tracked acceptance criteria checked, CI green, a biters minimal-diff lens pass) and only then merges the PR, lets the branch/PR bridge auto-close the tracked issue, and posts a tracker status update with a human-reviewable record.

Activates rocket-launch: treats the change as a ship request, enforces the full gate list before merging, merges the PR so the bridge closes the tracked issue, and records the outcome — refusing to merge if any gate is red.

evals.prompt: CI is failing on this PR but I want it merged now to close the ticket.
evals.expected_output: Activates rocket-launch but refuses to merge with a red gate: CI is not green so it blocks the launch, never silently closes the tracked issue by hand, and routes the fix back to roboports.

evals.prompt: Open a draft PR, this isn't ready yet.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT activate rocket-launch — the work is not ready to ship and there is nothing to gate or merge. Routes to roboports to continue implementation and open/update the PR.

evals.prompt: Mark the tracked issue done, I'll deal with the PR later.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to silently close the issue: closeout must go through the bridge (merge the PR with the issue id in the branch) and the acceptance check, not a manual close ahead of the merge.
